risk_if_not_implemented: Without Video Teleconference (VTC) Security, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Wireless Networking
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to control authorized wireless usage and monitor for unauthorized wireless access.
compensating_control_1.justification: Wireless Networking (NET-15) provides network-level access restriction that compensates for the absence of Video Teleconference (VTC) Security (AST-20) by limiting attacker reach and lateral movement opportunities across the environment. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Transmission Confidentiality
compensating_control_2.description: Cryptographic mechanisms exist to protect the confidentiality of data being transmitted.
compensating_control_2.justification: Transmission Confidentiality (CRY-03) provides cryptographic protection that compensates for the absence of Video Teleconference (VTC) Security (AST-20) by ensuring data confidentiality and integrity through alternative technical means. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
